other_observers: Nick Komar, Nick A. Komar, and Andrew Spenser.; Norm Erthal and Joe Roller found the bird on June 18. Several other birders saw this bird while it was still around including Brandon Percival, Rachel Hopper, Andy Boyce, Nathan Pieplow, and Joey Kellner.
specific_location: On the road McElmo Creek going towards Yellow Jacket Canyon.
description: It was yellowish orange, with black wings, throat, and tail. The black on the throat extended to the eye and just above the bill. A large top white wing bar and a small bottom wing bar. The black on the back extends to the back of the neck.Behaviors: It was usually hidden in some deciduous trees, but it would occasionally sit in an open spot in the trees.Call: Didn't hear it call or sing.Plumage: breeding
